usage: check_design [-help] [-id <string>] [-out_file <string>] {[{-type {library netlist synthesis power_intent timing hierarchical pin_assign budget assign_statements extract_rc place opt cts route signoff all} | -type_3d {db tech_lib netlist power_intent timing place floorplan route all}} [-format {table detail}]] [-no_check ]}

options.name: -format
options.description: table: to print the results in table format. detail : to print the results from check_design using the old style of log file. Basically, this is just a way to let user (if necessary) go back to the old style of log file for check_design.

options.name: -no_check
options.description: Just echo out all the messages that would be checked, don't do any checks

options.name: -out_file
options.description: Specifies output report file, contents dumped to this file is Tcl formatted

options.name: -type
options.description: {library netlist synthesis power_intent timing hierarchical pin_assign budget assign_statements extract_rc place opt cts route signoff all} List of categories to check, accepts single & multiple values (one or more categories)

options.name: -type_3d
options.description: {db tech_lib netlist power_intent timing place floorplan route all} List of 3DIC design categories to check, accepts single & multiple values (one or more categories)
